name: wechat-codex-bridge
description: Secure cross-platform bridge between WeChat ClawBot and local Codex

scripts.check: node --check bin/wechat-codex.js && node --check scripts/daemon.js && node --check scripts/smoke-playwright.js && node --check src/platform.js && node --check src/process-tree.js && node --check src/task-routing.js && node --check src/wake-lock.js && node --check src/commands.js && node --check src/error-policy.js && node --check src/service.js && node --check src/wechat-client.js && node --check src/codex-client.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/memory-store.js && node --check src/access-store.js
